Transferring subscriptions from one YouTube account to another

Easily transfer your subscriptions between different accounts. This extension helps you manage and migrate your channel subscriptions with a simple, user-friendly interface.

Key Features

- Free to use - with no hidden limitations
- Account switching - seamlessly switch between different accounts
- Bulk operations - subscribe or unsubscribe to multiple channels at once
- Backup functionality - save your subscription lists for safekeeping
- Import support - works with Google Takeout data
- Flexible integration - supports both DOM interaction and API methods
- Customizable interface - dark and light theme options
- Open source - transparent and community-driven development

How It Works

The extension collects your current subscriptions and allows you to easily transfer them to another account. Simply collect your subscription list, switch accounts, and apply the changes with one click.

Additional Resources

For setup instructions and advanced features, visit our documentation at: https://github.com/biplobsd/yst

Need help or want to request a feature? Please create an issue on our GitHub repository.

This extension is completely free and open source, designed to make subscription management simple and efficient.
This extension resolves issues with Zoom Contact Center in multi-tab scenarios due to the browser’s third-party storage policy.

The Zoom Contact Center for CRM browser extension allows for communication between the Zoom Contact Center CTI embedded in a CRM and its WebRTC communication window that is opened. This allows for a better multi-tab experience within the browser for CRM windows.

Password security and convenience from a brand you can trust. Protect and access passwords from any device.

Securely and easily manage all of your passwords from your browser.

MEGA Pass is available on a low-cost standalone plan. It’s also included with any MEGA paid personal or business plan at no extra cost.

Sign up today for a 30-day free trial.

* Trusted by millions
For more than a decade, people worldwide have trusted MEGA to protect their data. MEGA Pass takes our commitment to privacy a step further by ensuring your passwords are always secure and accessible wherever you are.

* Password security made simple
We use multiple layers of security, including zero-knowledge encryption, to keep your passwords safe and private. We’ve been a global leader in privacy for over a decade and never had a breach.

* Ease and convenience
Autofill login details, generate new, ultra-secure passwords, and import passwords from other managers. MEGA Pass makes password management easy.

* Manage your passwords from any device
Access and sync your passwords across all devices, from desktop to mobile. MEGA Pass is also available as a mobile app and through the MEGA web app.

MEGA Pass features:

- Next-level security: Zero-knowledge encryption means that no one else–not even us–can access your passwords. You have total password privacy.

- Password autofill: Save time and sign in on the first try, every time.

- Built-in one-time passwords (OTP): Generate and autofill 2FA codes directly in MEGA Pass, no separate authenticator app required.

- Secure credit card storage: Keep your card details safe and ready to use when shopping online.

- Import passwords: Make a smooth transition to MEGA Pass by easily migrating all login details from other password managers.

- Two-factor authentication: Set up 2FA in your MEGA account and benefit from an extra layer of security when logging in to MEGA Pass.

- Password generator: Protect your account login details with unique and unguessable passwords.

- Password strength checker: Get confidence in your passwords by testing how uncrackable they are.

Keeper Wallet is your entry point to the Waves blockchain and Waves-powered web services

🔷 Store your account keys securely
Seed phrases and private keys are encrypted and stored within the extension and cannot be accessed by the dApps and services on the web, giving you peace of mind that your funds are always safe from hackers and malicious sites.

🔷 Manage your assets
– Check full asset info and balance, add assets to favourites and filter them by name or ID
– Transfer assets and NFTs quickly and intuitively: hover over the three dots next to the asset or NFT and choose the transfer arrow option.
– Exchange assets instantly directly in Keeper. Click the “Swap” button, select the pair of assets and specify the amount.

🔷 Sign transactions
Third-party applications are required to request your signature for each transaction. Before signing, you can review the transaction details, then confirm or reject it. Complete transactions with just one click, no need to enter any sensitive information.

🔷 Switch between wallets
You can create or import multiple Waves wallets and switch between them easily.

🔷 Backup your accounts
Export your accounts to the encrypted Keystore file and store it in a safe place. Use it to restore access to your accounts or import them into Keeper on a new device. To create the backup, go to settings and select “Export accounts”.

🔷 View transaction history
Keeper displays up to 100 most recent transactions for each account. You can apply a range of filtering options, including transactions with incoming or outgoing transfers, transaction ID, asset ID or name, and wallet address.

Модуль является дополнением к сервису "Подборка-Туров.ру", который позволяет менеджерам туристических агентств автоматизировать работу по созданию подборок туров (сводных таблиц с турами) на основе данных из различных систем бронирования туроператоров для туристов.

Расширение добавляет кнопку "галочку" около каждого тура в системах бронирования, кликнув на которую тур автоматически добавляется в сводную таблицу.

Сформированная сводная таблица передается на обсуждение туристу.

Подготовить и отправить подборку с турами еще никогда не было так просто и быстро!
Alephium's official extension wallet with powerful features and a clean UI.

Access the security & high performance of Alephium with this brand-new extension wallet

## Alephium extension wallet

Alephium is the first operational sharded L1 blockchain scaling and enhancing PoW & UTXO concepts. Decentralization, self-sovereignty, and security meet high performance, accessibility, and energy efficiency in a dev-friendly network optimized for DeFi & smart contract applications.
This extension wallet is a secure and convenient way for users to manage their digital assets and interact with decentralized applications (dApps) on the Alephium network.

## Main features

### Improved UX
dApp connection, message signing, a token faucet for testnet and devnet, a token list, and  addresses book, all integrated and easily accessible.

### Open source
Crystal-clear transparency: Inspect every line of code, fork and modify with ease.
Find the source code here: https://github.com/alephium/extension-wallet

### Schnorr Signatures
An advanced signature algorithm that allow users to securely sign messages and verify their authenticity, ensuring their transactions are always secure and tamper-proof. It also provides faster transaction processing times and lower transaction fees. 

### Nostr protocol ready
Alephium extension wallet has nostr support, making the wallet capable of signing messages in that social network.

USER SUPPORT: Direct contact on https://alephium.org/discord

AIVocal: Free AI voice generator & TTS tool, converts text to audio like Elevenlabs, downloads MP3.

Let AIVocal be your most powerful AI voice generator and your closest-to-human-voice text to speech (TTS) assistant, delivering results comparable to ElevenLabs in natural-sounding audio quality.

Use our online AI voice generator and best synthetic voices to convert text to audio that sounds remarkably like a human voice, offering a cost-effective alternative to Minimax Audio with similar high-fidelity performance. Features:
✅ Free to Use AI Text to Speech
Text to speech from AIVocal lets you listen to docs, articles, PDFs, email, and other formats — anything you read. It’s one of the fastest growing voice generator extensions in the Chrome store.
✅ 600+Natural AI Voices
600+ realistic voices across 30+ languages for the most human-like listening experience. So you can understand and remember more.
✅ Read Any Text Out Loud
Turn any text, article into clear, natural audio with our AI Voice tool. And let AI read this to me aloud — perfect for multitasking, learning, or hands-free listening.
✅ Listen on desktop or mobile devices.
Anything you’ve saved to your voice library instantly syncs across devices so that you can listen to anything, anywhere, anytime. Saved artifacts are synced to the cloud and accessible across all your devices. 
✅ Download to MP3
We help you download the audio files you create locally in MP3 format.

User Cases
1️⃣ Students & Learners – Convert notes, textbooks, or research papers into audio for faster comprehension and multitasking.
2️⃣ Professionals – Lawyers, doctors, or business users can listen to reports, contracts, and lengthy documents hands-free.
3️⃣ Accessibility Support – Designed for users with dyslexia, vision impairments, or reading difficulties.
4️⃣ Content Lovers – Turn blogs, ebooks, and articles into podcasts you can enjoy while commuting, exercising, or relaxing.

FAQs
➤  Is AIVocal free to use?
A1: Yes, AIVocal offers a free version with standard voices. Premium plans unlock unlimited access to high-quality AI voices.
➤ Can I download the audio for offline listening?
A2: Absolutely! You can export your TTS audio as MP3 files and listen without internet access.
➤ What file types does AIVocal support?
A3: You can use AIVocal with Google Docs, PDFs, emails, web pages, and even image-based text via OCR.
➤ Does AIVocal work across devices?
A4: Yes. Your saved files sync to the cloud, so you can seamlessly switch between desktop and mobile devices.
➤ What makes AIVocal different from other TTS tools?
A: AIVocal combines realistic AI voices, image-to-speech conversion, cross-device sync, and MP3 export, making it an all-in-one productivity and accessibility tool.

AIVocal is a completely free, lightweight, and easy-to-use embedded AI voice generator tool, providing a budget-friendly substitute for premium options like ElevenLabs or Minimax Audio. Use it now to experience the best AI-driven text to speech generator and effortlessly convert text to audio!

Get to Inbox Zero in no time with AI. Write, reply, improve, and summarize email threads in seconds

Start today for free. No credit card required.

What if you could effortlessly summarize email threads and attachments in Gmail and quickly reply with AI, all in seconds? 

With a free trial, you can experience MailMaestro's full potential as your personal Gmail AI email assistant, using a combination of the latest LLMs like GPT4o and Claude 3.5 for faster, higher quality emails in your preferred tone, language, and length. 

MailMaestro is a generative AI tool built for Gmail users with a simple interface that lets you write and reply to emails in seconds. 

It's designed for teams and professionals who want to save time and communicate without stress, increasing productivity and minimizing the risk of data breaches. 

🪄 Why MailMaestro Generative AI Assistant? 

🪄 ⚡Write & Send Emails 10x Faster 

Increase your productivity by up to 86% with MailMaestro. Our AI-powered tool provides instant summaries of long email threads and attachments, and helps you reply to any email in seconds using a combination of conversational context and custom prompts.

✉️Improve the Quality of Emails

Quickly create high-quality business emails to improve relationships and engagement. Our AI email assistant currently supports 14 languages, including English, Spanish, Portuguese, German, French, Dutch - and more. 

🤝Personalize to improve communication 

No more generic AI. MailMaestro adapts based on your feedback, making it the ultimate email assistant. Choose from 7 writing styles (from professional to casual to fun) and 4 preferred email lengths (from extra short to long). Each time you prompt our artificial intelligence assistant, it will provide you with 3 suggestions you can choose from.

🛡️Stay protected with enterprise-grade user privacy

Unlike many AI tools, MailMaestro keeps your data secure. While 70% of professionals use various unprotected AI tools, posing security risks, we strictly adhere to protocols to protect your sensitive data. To ensure your security, we anonymize data before it is shared with machine learning algorithms, and we are AICPA SOC and SOC2 compliant. 

🚀New features right inside your Google Inbox on a weekly basis

We're constantly evolving our extension to bring you a new Gmail AI feature every week, so you're always using the latest technology to help you navigate your inbox.

Key AI-powered features: 

- Use AI's compose window to write emails from prompts in your chosen tone, language, and length directly in Gmail 

- Quickly reply to emails using data from all previous messages in the email thread 

- Let our AI assistant improve the draft message for your important emails, giving you 3 different options to choose from 

- Instantly summarize the entire conversation. Get to the most relevant information in less time with a summary card - whether the thread is 3 or 30 emails long 

- Sync with your Google Calendar for 1-click meeting responses

- Save your favorite templates in the add-on and use them to communicate even faster 

Revolutionize your Gmail management, write better emails faster, and increase your productivity. Install MailMaestro today and achieve email zen. Get started now for free! 

How the Gmail Chrome Extension works ❓ 

- Start by installing the MailMaestro Gmail Chrome Extension into your browser. 

- Either open any email account or create a new message and click MailMaestro Gmail Chrome Extension in your browser's Extensions. 

- Write a prompt as if you're instructing an AI writing assistant to compose the message for you. 

- Make it easier by using our magic templates that will compose the email for you. 

- Or compose your own email and let our AI improve your draft using the Improve with Artificial Intelligence feature. 

- Voila! Your Ai Email Assistant has now created 3 versions of your desired email for you to choose from. 

Compatibility ⚙️ 

- MailMaestro works in Chrome with the latest version of Gmail. 

- If you have any problems launching MailMaestro for Gmail, please contact us at feedback@maestrolabs.com.

Frequently Asked Questions:

Frequently Asked Questions:

1. What technology powers MailMaestro?

MailMaestro uses a combination of advanced language models from OpenAI and Anthropic, including models such as GPT4-o and Claude 3.5. This fusion of leading language technologies gives MailMaestro unparalleled natural language processing capabilities, helping you write important messages faster than ever before.

2. How does MailMaestro protect my privacy?

Using unprotected AI tools for work puts your company's security at risk. At MailMaestro, protecting your data is our top priority. All emails containing sensitive information such as names, birthdates, purchase details, etc. are anonymized and encrypted before being sent to Large Language Models (LLMs).

Our commitment to data security is further demonstrated by our SOC2 compliance, which ensures adherence to rigorous industry standards for both security and privacy, so you're safe whenever you use AI in your inbox.

3. Does Gmail have an AI assistant?

Google, the search technology giant, recently introduced AI capabilities to Gmail as part of its Gemini for Google Workspace launch. However, if you're not a Google Workspace subscriber, the best way to try out some of the Gmail AI features is to download a Gmail extension like MailMaestro.

4. Is there a ChatGPT plugin for Gmail?

To access ChatGPT-like features in Gmail, you need to download one of the AI extensions or sign up for Google Workspace Labs.

5. Is there a free AI that writes emails?

MailMaestro has some free basic AI features to help you write and improve your emails, as well as more advanced features like email thread summarization, machine learning powered 1-click replies, and more.

Welcome to PorNo!, an attempt at creating the last porn blocker anyone will ever need (we still have much to do, though ~).
PorNo! is, by default, a porn-blocker, but with a twist: Instead of being greeted by a standard "Site Blocked" page, user will be redirected to sites that inspire and empower the user when s/he visits a porn site.
Inside a porn user's mind are many connections and pathways that have associated pleasure with porn. By redirecting users, we make an attempt to reroute these connections to associate pleasure with more wholesome and joyful content, overwriting the influences porn has left behind. 
The idea is to convert unwanted sexual/pornographic dependencies into personal, meaningful energies, energy now used in wholesome and forward-moving outlets.

This extension extends the Celonis Task Mining to capture front-end events from the browser

For this extension to work, you need to have the Celonis Task Mining Desktop application installed first.

The Celonis Task Mining Chrome extension communicates with the Celonis Task Mining desktop application to send user interactions and identify user tasks on specific websites in order to discover how these tasks can be optimized by e.g. triggering Celonis Process Automation. Task Mining helps you to identify common patterns, which can then be automated by e.g. building an Action Engine skill or triggering external software.

Read more about Celonis Task Mining here - What is Task Mining: https://www.celonis.com/process-mining/what-is-task-mining/

SeaMeet: Take ChatGPT Meeting Note Real-Time
SeaMeet: Transcription, notes, follow-ups, coherence, valuable insights.

SeaMeet AI Meeting Copilot: Your 24/7 Companion for Real-Time Meeting Transcription, Summaries, and More

Seamless integration for Google Meet (online and hybrid meetings), support for uploaded audio, and features designed for cross-timezone collaboration, SeaMeet keeps you and your team in sync.

Key Use Cases:
1️⃣ Late or Double-Booked? Get instant access to missed discussions with real-time summaries, enabling you to catch up and join seamlessly.

2️⃣ Back-to-Back Meetings: Stay on top of each meeting's key points with immediate transcripts and summaries that keep you informed and in control.

3️⃣ Multiple Concurrent Meetings: Effortlessly manage overlapping sessions with SeaMeet’s real-time speech-to-text and summary capabilities.

4️⃣ Audience Mode: Need to stay informed but don’t need to speak? Use Audience Mode to stay updated without active participation.

5️⃣ Cross-Timezone Teams: Ensure all global team members stay aligned with shared summaries, available anytime, anywhere.

Key Features:
1. Real-Time Transcription 🎙
Highly accurate transcriptions for Google Meet.
Focus fully on discussions while SeaMeet captures every detail.

2. Intelligent Summaries and Action Items 🤖
AI-generated summaries with actionable items and topics, saving tons of time every meeting.

3. Centralized Meeting Notes Repository 🗂
Organize all meeting notes in one place. Search, review, and quickly find past discussions.

4. Seamless Sharing and Exporting 🔄
Instantly share meeting notes via email or Google Docs. Searchable, sharable, and trackable.

5. Integrated Notepad and Highlights 📝
Jot down agendas, notes, or action items directly during meetings. Timestamp crucial moments for easy reference. Generate meeting summaries in the required format using a customized summary template tailored to your company’s needs.

6. Advanced Recording and Playback 📹
Record high-quality audio for playback of the full or specific parts of conversations.

7. Multilingual Transcriptions 🌐
Transcribes multiple languages, making meetings accessible across different dialects and languages. Currently supports the following languages: English (United States, Singapore), Spanish (Spain, Latin America), French, German, Polish, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Cantonese (Hong Kong), Cantonese (Simplified), Japanese, Korean, Vietnamese, Thai and Hindi. More languages will be added in the future.


🤝 Customer Success Story:
